title: Sicilian Defence – Najdorf
summary: Black's most popular response to 1.e4, fighting for the centre asymmetrically.

title: Opposite-Side Castling Pawn Storm
summary: When players castle on opposite sides, the game becomes a race to checkmate the enemy king using pawns as battering rams.
keyIdeas: Pawn storm on the king's castle
Avoid defensive moves that create weaknesses

title: King Opposition & Key Squares
summary: Mastering the concept of opposition is critical for winning or drawing king and pawn endgames.
keyIdeas: Guide your pawn to the promotion square
